description_long: This object consists of five distinct cabinet or shelf units arranged in a row on a dark rectangular base. Each unit has a unique geometric design, with some featuring intricate cutouts, slots, or layered structures, while others are more solid and block-like. The surfaces appear to be made of a uniform, matte gray material, likely metal or painted wood, with no visible glass panels or decorative elements. The units vary in internal structure, with some having open sections or cavities that could serve as storage or display spaces. There are no visible handles, knobs, or pulls, and the overall design is modern and abstract, possibly intended for urban public spaces or as sculptural storage. The base provides stability and visually unifies the group, making it suitable for placement in parks, plazas, or contemporary urban environments.
description: A row of five modern, abstract cabinet or shelf units with unique geometric designs, all mounted on a dark rectangular base. The units are matte gray, with some featuring open cutouts and others appearing solid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the varied geometric faces and open sections of all five units, highlighting their unique designs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and profile of each unit, with the layered and blocky structures more apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the units, some with additional cutouts or solid panels, mirroring the front's diversity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profiles and the arrangement of the units on the base.
